title: doppler: API token stored unzeroized (String not Zeroizing)
description: secretx-doppler/src/lib.rs stores the API token as a plain String field, not Zeroizing<String>. All other comparable backends (Azure KV, Bitwarden) use Zeroizing. Trigger: DopplerBackend drops → token bytes remain in heap memory, may appear in core dumps, swap, or memory scans. Inconsistent with the crate's stated security posture.
